title: Season Craft
description: A Modpack about survival, farming, cooking and building
body:
This mod pack focuses on **survival**, **cooking**, **exploration** and **building**. With mods like [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight), [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons), [Tough as Nails](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails) and many more, you can learn how to survive the cold winter and hot summer. Decorative mods like [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped) let you build a beautiful farm and care for your animals and plants.
<details>
<summary>world generation</summary>

**Here you can see the incredible world generation of this modpack!**
